compositionPolicy.semantics: Preserve modal dialog focus containment/restoration when modal, labelled region semantics when embedded, editable combobox/listbox state, disabled commands, groups, and nested-page back navigation.
compositionPolicy.enhancement: showExecutionPreview is additive and false removes preview UI, live output, callbacks, and accessibility output. shouldFilter=false removes internal matching so an independently ranked local or remote result set is preserved. presentation and navigationAdapter remain independently selectable; embedded mode adds no modal semantics or focus trap.
